# Hexa-go Logistics and Transport

> Hexa-go Logistics and Transport is a professional logistics company headquartered in Aluva, Ernakulam, Kerala, India. Founded in 2024, the company provides Full Truck Load (FTL), Partial Truck Load (PTL), 3PL Warehouse Management, and 4PL Supply Chain solutions across India.

## Company Details
- Official Website: https://hexagologistics.com
- LinkedIn: https://in.linkedin.com/company/hexa-go-logistics-and-transport
- Phone: +91 7034298745, +91 8848776836
- Email: info@hexagologistics.com
- Address: Vadakumury Building, Metro Pillar 174, Aluva, Kerala 683101, India
- Founders: Harisankar U (Founder & Owner), Akshay Raj K (Owner & CEO)
- Founded: 2024

## Services
- Full Truck Load (FTL) Transport: Dedicated trucks for large shipments (5+ tonnes) across India with direct point-to-point delivery, faster transit, and lower damage risk.
- Partial Truck Load (PTL) Transport: Cost-effective shared truck solutions for loads from 100 kg to 5 tonnes with reliable pan-India delivery schedules.
- 3PL Warehouse Management: Secure third-party warehousing in Kerala with real-time inventory tracking, order fulfillment, and efficient dispatch management.
- 4PL Supply Chain Management: End-to-end supply chain orchestration from sourcing to last-mile delivery optimization across India.
- Fleet Management and GPS Tracking: Real-time GPS fleet tracking, driver management, and freight coordination for road transport.
- Last-Mile Delivery: Reliable last-mile delivery covering 1000+ pincodes across India for e-commerce and retail businesses.

## Service Areas
Kerala, Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, Maharashtra, Delhi NCR, Telangana, Andhra Pradesh, and all major Indian industrial corridors. Coverage spans 1000+ pincodes across India.

## Industries Served
Manufacturing, E-commerce and Retail, FMCG (Fast Moving Consumer Goods), Pharmaceuticals, Automotive Parts, Agriculture and Food Products, Electronics, Construction Materials.

## Contact
- Customer Service: +91 7034298745
- Sales: +91 8848776836
- Email: info@hexagologistics.com
- Office Hours: Monday to Saturday, 9:30 AM to 7:30 PM IST
- Quote Request: https://hexagologistics.com/contact_us.html

## How to Book
1. Share your requirement (cargo type, weight, origin, destination) via phone or email
2. Receive a competitive quote within hours
3. Confirm booking with pickup date, time, and service type
4. Track shipment with real-time GPS updates from pickup to delivery
